input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.content:
Here's my analysis of the legacy patterns and the modernized SDK-style conversion:

**Legacy patterns found:**

| Pattern | Status in SDK-style |
|---------|-------------------|
| `xmlns` and `ToolsVersion` attributes | Removed (SDK handles it) |
| `Import` of Common.props / CSharp.targets | Replaced by `Sdk` attribute |
| `ProjectGuid` | Unnecessary |
| `Configuration`/`Platform` conditions | SDK defaults suffice |
| Debug/Release `PropertyGroup` blocks | SDK provides sensible defaults |
| `FileAlignment`, `ErrorReport`, `WarningLevel` | Default values, removable |
| Explicit `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK auto-globs all `.cs` files |
| Framework `<Reference>` items (System, etc.) | Implicit with target framework |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Replaced by csproj properties |

Now I'll apply the modernization:

arguments.old_str:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Project ToolsVersion="15.0" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003">
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props" Condition="Exists('$(MSBuildExtensionsPath)\$(MSBuildToolsVersion)\Microsoft.Common.props')" />
  <PropertyGroup>
    <Configuration Condition=" '$(Configuration)' == '' ">Debug</Configuration>
    <Platform Condition=" '$(Platform)' == '' ">AnyCPU</Platform>
    <ProjectGuid>{12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012}</ProjectGuid>
    <OutputType>Library</OutputType>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>
    <FileAlignment>512</FileAlignment>
    <AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>true</AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>
    <Deterministic>true</Deterministic>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Debug|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugSymbols>true</DebugSymbols>
    <DebugType>full</DebugType>
    <Optimize>false</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Debug\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>DEBUG;TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <PropertyGroup Condition=" '$(Configuration)|$(Platform)' == 'Release|AnyCPU' ">
    <DebugType>pdbonly</DebugType>
    <Optimize>true</Optimize>
    <OutputPath>bin\Release\</OutputPath>
    <DefineConstants>TRACE</DefineConstants>
    <ErrorReport>prompt</ErrorReport>
    <WarningLevel>4</WarningLevel>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Reference Include="System" />
    <Reference Include="System.Core" />
    <Reference Include="System.Data" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml" />
    <Reference Include="System.Xml.Linq" />
    <Reference Include="Microsoft.CSharp" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>
arguments.new_str:
<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk">

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
    <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion>
    <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove obsolete AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties directory

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove obsolete AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties directory

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and modernize the project file to SDK-style format.

Legacy patterns identified:
1. **XML namespace declaration** (`xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"`) - not needed in SDK-style
2. **ToolsVersion attribute** - not needed
3. **Explicit Import of Microsoft.Common.props and Microsoft.CSharp.targets** - replaced by `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` attribute
4. **ProjectGuid** - not needed
5. **Explicit Configuration/Platform conditions** - defaults are handled by SDK


6. **Debug/Release PropertyGroups with default values** - SDK provides sensible defaults
7. **FileAlignment** - default, not needed
8. **AutoGenerateBindingRedirects** - default for some project types
9. **Explicit Compile ItemGroup** - SDK-style uses globbing (all .cs files are included automatically)
10. **Explicit framework assembly References** (System, System.Core, etc.) - handled by the target framework
11. **Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs** - can be replaced with properties in the .csproj file (SDK auto-generates assembly info)
12. **TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2** → needs to be converted to the modern `net472` format

, then I can start the modernization process.

data.content:
Done. The project has been modernized from **47 lines → 16 lines**. Here's what was simplified:

| Removed | Why |
|---------|-----|
| XML declaration, `xmlns`, `ToolsVersion` | SDK-style doesn't need them |
| `Import` of props/targets | Handled by `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` |
| `ProjectGuid`, `OutputType` (Library is default) | SDK defaults |
| Debug/Release PropertyGroups | SDK provides standard debug/release behavior |
| `<Compile Include="...">` items | SDK auto-includes all `*.cs` files |
| `<Reference>` to framework assemblies | Implicit with `net472` target |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Replaced by `<PropertyGroup>` metadata |

The `Properties/` directory has been removed since assembly info is now generated automatically from the csproj properties.
